nasb.text: Now Pharaoh’s cup was in my hand; so I took the grapes and squeezed them into Pharaoh’s cup, and I put the cup into Pharaoh’s hand.”

esv.text: Pharaoh’s cup was in my hand, and I took the grapes and pressed them into Pharaoh’s cup and placed the cup in Pharaoh’s hand.”

cnv.text: 法老的杯在我手裡，我拿了葡萄擠在法老的杯中，把杯遞在法老的手裡。”

ccb.text: 我手上拿着法老的酒杯，摘下葡萄，把汁挤在酒杯中，然后递给法老。”

csbs.text: 法老的杯子在我的手中，我就拿了葡萄挤到法老的杯子里，然后把杯子递在法老的手中。”
